title: Query Semantics Control Layer
reason: Added a deterministic semantics judge and resolver in front of changed-route publication so Fulcrum preserves head products, meaningful phrases, subtype aliases, and key modifiers before allowing a new route to compete.
monitoring_note: Watch changed-route families where Fulcrum wants to swap the current page. The new route should keep the head product and key modifiers, and broad or ambiguous wording should suppress unsafe brand or PDP jumps.

title: Broad Query Signal Cleanup And Modifier Preservation
reason: Stopped generic brand and SKU false positives from forcing broad queries into brands or products, and strengthened modifier preservation so Fulcrum does not swap to a new route that drops key terms like damask, alternative down, or hospital.
monitoring_note: Watch broad family queries that changed routes too aggressively. If the new route drops a meaningful modifier or relies on a generic brand word, it should stay on the current category or product instead.

title: Deterministic Logic Regression Suite
reason: Added a repeatable regression runner so known query-family fixes are checked after every scoring change instead of relying only on AI review.
monitoring_note: Run the logic regression script after changing gate, intent, or ranking code and compare the results before publishing.

title: Current Category Preservation Narrowed
reason: Allowed the current category to hold its place only when it preserves the full source-aligned topic and the query is not brand-, collection-, or SKU-led.
monitoring_note: Watch for product-led queries falling back to categories when brand or collection signals are present.

title: Source Topic Preservation and Accessory Demotion
reason: Penalized targets that drop key source-aligned topic tokens and demoted accessory targets when the query is not explicitly asking for an accessory or replacement.
monitoring_note: Check that broad family queries keep their main category while genuine accessory queries still surface the correct narrow target.

title: Attribute Specificity Guard
reason: Stopped generic words like box, cover, and spring from masquerading as hard or soft attributes when the query does not carry explicit attribute intent.
monitoring_note: Verify that size- and pack-led queries still classify as specific products while generic family queries stay broad.

title: AI Audit False-Positive Downgrade
reason: Added deterministic post-processing so the AI reviewer does not mark valid category winners as wrong-page-type mistakes just because a tighter product title exists.
monitoring_note: Keep using the AI audit as a failure detector only; repeated clusters should become code or regression cases.
